title: Manufacturing Engineer - Supreme Industries - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Supreme Industries - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Supreme Industries has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supreme Industries:
Supreme Industries is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supreme Industries!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
